articles.author: Elise Hammond, Katie Hunt, Ashley Strickland, Jackie Wattles, Nina Giraldo, Taylor Galgano, Jennifer Arnow, Jacopo Prisco, Deblina Chakraborty, Devon M. Sayers, Ed Lavandera, Aditi Sangal
articles.title: Live updates: Artemis II astronauts splash down off California’s coast - CNN
articles.description: After making history on their journey around the moon, NASA’s Reid Wiseman, Victor Glover, Christina Koch and Canadian Space Agency astronaut Jeremy Hansen are coming home.
articles.content: The Artemis II astronauts will be retrieved from the Orion capsule and delivered to the medical bay aboard the US Navys USS John P. Murtha recovery vessel within two hours of splashdown, said Liliana… [+1343 chars]

articles.author: Lydia Amazouz
articles.title: NASA Signals Major Artemis 3 Leap As Moon Return Strategy Accelerates - The Daily Galaxy
articles.description: NASA is already preparing Artemis 3 while Artemis 2 returns home, signaling an accelerated path back to the Moon.
articles.content: NASA is already shifting focus toward Artemis 3 even as Artemis 2 continues its mission, a move highlighted by NASA Administrator Jared Isaacman that underscores a decisive push toward a sustained hu… [+5579 chars]

articles.author: Stephen Clark
articles.title: Orion helium leak no threat to Artemis II reentry but will require redesign - Ars Technica
articles.description: After leaks on Artemis I and II, Orion's next flight to the Moon will need new valves.

articles.author: Mike Wall
articles.title: 'We all pretty much broke down right there': Inside the Artemis 2 astronauts' emotional moment near the moon - Space
articles.description: "That was, I think, where the four of us were the most forged, the most bonded, and we came out of that really focused on that day ahead."
